news.t: New Oil Stock Debuts With Dividend Yield Above 12%
Nine Strive funds will move primary listing from NYSE Arca, Inc. and NASDAQ Stock Market LLC to New York Stock Exchange
Strive Asset Management Announces Launch of the Strive FAANG 2.0 ETF (NYSE: FTWO)

holdings.infoBox: FTWO is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Deere & Company stock at 10.33%, Exxon Mobil at 8.38%, Constellation Energy at 7.80%, GE Aerospace at 5.10%, and Chevron at 4.75%.

overview.description: The Strive Natural Resources and Security ETF (FTWO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg FAANG 2.0 Select index. The fund tracks a narrow index of large- and mid-cap stocks providing exposure to North American companies engaged in the natural resources and national security industries. Stocks are selected based on market-cap while equally weighting sector exposure. FTWO was launched on Aug 31, 2023 and is issued by Alpha Architect.
